title: Design System: Sistema de Votacion Electronica Distribuido

title.purpose: Election and candidate names in lists.

body.purpose: Everyday reading text, input values, button labels.

shadows.name: interactive-hover
shadows.purpose: Button hover and focus state lift.

motion.name: list-hover
motion.purpose: List item hover background and border transition.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button for login and registration.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #16213e; color: #fff; padding: 0.6rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0f3460; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #16213e; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Success Button
components.css: .ds-btn-success { background: #2d6a4f; color: #fff; padding: 0.6rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-success:hover { background: #1b4332; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-btn-success:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2d6a4f; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-success:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #e0e0e0; color: #333; padding: 0.6rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #ccc; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #16213e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input for email and password.
components.css: .ds-label { display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; color: #444; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.6rem 0.8rem; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #1a1a2e; background: #fff; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #16213e; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #999; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container for each step of the voting flow.
components.html:
Iniciar Sesion

Ingrese sus credenciales para acceder al sistema de votacion.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 2rem; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; color: #1a1a2e; }

components.name: List Item
components.description: Clickable election or candidate list item.
components.html:
• C
    Dr. Carlos Lopez

    Lista A
components.css: .ds-list-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #eee; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-list-item:hover { border-color: #16213e; background: #f8f9ff; } .ds-avatar { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #16213e; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Step Indicator
components.description: Wizard step number in the progress bar.
components.css: .ds-step-num { width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; background: #e0e0e0; color: #666; } .ds-step-done { background: #2d6a4f; color: #fff; } .ds-step-active { background: #16213e; color: #fff; }

components.name: Result Bar
components.description: Horizontal bar chart for election results.
components.html:
Dr. Carlos Lopez
42%
1240 votes
components.css: .ds-result-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-result-name { width: 120px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a2e; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-result-bar { flex: 1; height: 28px; background: #eee; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-result-fill { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #16213e, #0f3460); border-radius: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding-left: 0.5rem; color: #fff; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; min-width: fit-content; } .ds-result-votes { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #555; width: 60px; text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Success Alert
components.css: .ds-alert-success { padding: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; background: #d8f3dc; color: #1b4332; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }

components.name: Error Alert
components.css: .ds-alert-error { padding: 0.8rem; border-radius: 6px; background: #f8d7da; color: #842029; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }

narrative.overview:
A well-lit voting station — transparent sightlines, deliberate sightlines, nothing between the voter and their choice. The interface steps aside and lets the act of voting feel consequential, not confusing. Every surface is clean and purposeful: Institutional Navy anchors authority, Civic Green marks progress, and white surfaces keep the focus on content. Shadows are subtle and earned — they appear only where interaction happens, not as decorative layering.

This system explicitly rejects corporate dashboard aesthetics, dark mode, gamified feedback, and any visual noise that competes with the voting task. It serves Spanish-speaking university students and faculty; the language is woven into the UI, not bolted on after the fact.
keyCharacteristics: Civic trust through restrained authority colors, not visual density
Progress as a visible, sequential journey through the 5-step flow
Feedback on every action — loading, confirmation, error, result — never silence
Mobile-scaled interactions, desktop layouts in one responsive pass
Flat surfaces with interactive elevation: shadows only on hoverable elements, not on containers at rest

rules.name: The One Hue Rule
rules.body: The navy is the sole chromatic authority. The green is not a second accent — it is a semantic signal (done, confirm, success), not a decorative accent. If it marks completion, use Civic Green. For everything else, use Institutional Navy or a neutral.

rules.name: The Interactive Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are earned by interaction, not by container type. Cards and containers sit flat at rest. Shadows appear on hovered buttons, focused inputs, and active interactive states.

rules.name: The Tool Font Rule
rules.body: No custom typefaces. The system stack loads instantly, matches the OS chrome, and costs zero network requests. The interface is a tool, not a poster.

dos: Do use Institutional Navy as the single authority color. Let it anchor headers, primary buttons, and active states.
Do use Civic Green exclusively for completion and confirmation — done steps, success buttons, registered votes.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest. Shadows signal interactivity.
Do design for mobile first. Voting happens on phones between classes.
Do give feedback on every voter action — loading spinner, success message, or error text.
Do maintain WCAG AA contrast on all text.
Do write every label, error, and instruction in Spanish.
donts: Don't use dark backgrounds or dark navbars.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, side-stripe borders, or any decorative effect.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) above the step progress bar.
Don't let text overflow its container.
Don't rely on color alone for status.
Don't use the tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow pattern above any section.
